D1 Optics L3 Apply Atom

Beat Frequency

tune two waves to nearly the same frequency and watch a slow envelope appear

The sum of two close-frequency waves is a fast carrier modulated by a slow envelope at the difference frequency.

Tune f₁ and f₂ near each other. The gold dashed envelope (sum row) pulses at the beat frequency — set them equal and the envelope flattens to a constant.
